name: ats3-lsp-client
description: VSCode client for the ATS3 language server (diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition).

ats3.server.module.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the LSP server entrypoint (a node script run over stdio). When empty, the client auto-resolves the ATS3-built `server/lsp-server/xats-lsp-server.js`, falling back to the WS-0b stub (`server/stub/server.js`) if it has not been built.

ats3.server.nodePath.description: Path to the node executable used to launch the server.

ats3.xatshome.markdownDescription: Path to the ATS3/Xanadu repo root (`XATSHOME`), needed by the checker to locate the prelude. When empty, defaults to two directories above the extension (the repo root in the in-tree layout).

ats3.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VSCode and the ATS3 language server.
